sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'clickHouse'), (3, 'Fuzz Testing');
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE name ILIKE '%world%';
UPDATE test_strings SET name = 'ClickHouse Testing' WHERE name ILIKE 'click%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE name ILIKE '%Testing%';
